---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new behavior or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels:
  - enhancement
---

### Problem

What workflow is currently hard or missing? What is the outcome you need?

### Proposed behavior

Describe the behavior change with an ideal CLI command or UX flow.

### Why now

Which user scenario this improves (switching speed, reliability, onboarding, observability, etc.).

### Scope

- Affected provider(s): [ ] claude [ ] codex [ ] gemini
- CLI area: [ ] command parsing [ ] profile storage [ ] watcher [ ] logging [ ] tests
- Risk level: low / medium / high

### Acceptance criteria

- What must be true for this request to be considered done?
- What tests or artifacts should be updated?
